parties.name: PELOSI, LAURENCE 901 PARAMOUNT ROAD OAKLAND, CA 94610

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Laurence Pelosi in Propria Persona.

Mr. Pelosi stated that he is requesting this order because he is applying for dual Italian citizenship for himself and his Children, that the Italian Government requires proof of marriage and that his Parents' records burned in a fire. Mr. Pelosi also explained that there are two Officiants names because St. Mary's had their own Priest and his Father had his own Priest from St. Ignatius who he wanted to perform the ceremony, and that there is no reason as to why record wasn't filed. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Continued To Nov-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
